center.name: 阿拉斯加湾
center.summary: 阿拉斯加湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括雪鸮，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Another female migrated to the Canada–United States border, then moved back to the Gulf of Alaska, then to winter in the same border areas and then finally to both Banks and Victoria Island. Snowy owls from the Canadian Arctic were monitored to have covered an average of in one autumn then covered an average of a year later.{{cite journal | last1=Therrien | first1=J.-F
